# GitHub Copilot Instructions for perfil

## Project Overview
This is a repository for a Git README profile. It contains markdown documentation and profile information.

## Technical Stack
- Markdown for documentation
- Git for version control

## Code Style and Conventions
- Use clear, concise language in markdown files
- Follow standard markdown formatting conventions
- Keep README files well-structured and easy to read
- Use proper heading hierarchy (start with h1, then h2, etc.)
- Include meaningful commit messages

## Documentation Guidelines
- All documentation should be in markdown format
- Keep documentation up-to-date with any changes
- Use proper grammar and spelling
- Include examples where appropriate
- Use bullet points and numbered lists for clarity

## Boundaries and Constraints
- Do not commit sensitive information (API keys, passwords, etc.)
- Keep the repository focused on profile/README content
- Maintain consistency with existing file structure
- Preserve Spanish language content where present

## Best Practices
- Review all changes before committing
- Keep commits focused and atomic
- Write descriptive commit messages
- Follow Git best practices for branching and merging
